prerequisites: A paid Oveit organizer account. API access is not included with free plans.
The email address associated with your Oveit organizer account (the connector's required "email" config field).
The password for that organizer account (the connector's required, secret "password" config field).

authMethods.name: Organizer email and password
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with your Oveit organizer "email" and "password". Oveit's API exchanges these credentials at POST https://l.oveit.com/api/seller/login for an access token. That token is supplied on subsequent calls, either as a request parameter or via the Authorization: Bearer header. Tokens expire after 48 hours, but each API call made with a token resets that timer, so a token expires 48 hours after its last use. Invalid or expired tokens return 403 Forbidden.

setupSteps.title: Get a paid organizer account
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Oveit with an organizer account on a paid plan. API access is not available on free plans, so confirm your plan supports it before configuring the connector.

setupSteps.title: Provide your email
setupSteps.body: Enter the email address of your Oveit organizer account in the required "email" config field.

setupSteps.title: Provide your password
setupSteps.body: Enter the password for that organizer account in the required, secret "password" config field. The connector uses your email and password to obtain an access token from Oveit's seller/login endpoint automatically.
